document_input_canonical_param_for_file_: Document input (canonical param for file upload or URL)
integrate_reducto_parse_into_the_workflo: Integrate Reducto Parse into the workflow. Can extract text from uploaded PDF documents, or from a URL.
parse_an_intake_form_pdf_and_pull_struct: Parse an intake form PDF and pull structured fields into a table or record.
parse_an_invoice_or_financial_pdf_into_s: Parse an invoice or financial PDF into structured line-item tables for AP automation.
parse_an_uploaded_pdf_into_clean_text_fo: Parse an uploaded PDF into clean text for downstream summarizing or search.
parsed_document_content_with_chunks_and_: Parsed document content with chunks and blocks
pdf_document_file_upload_or_file_referen: PDF document (file upload or file reference)
unique_identifier_for_the_processing_job: Unique identifier for the processing job
